Added mineru[all] to pyproject.toml optional-dependencies. Verified import: from mineru.cli.common import do_parse works. Note: bead specified magic-pdf[full] but package was renamed to mineru in v2.0; corrected per Context7 docs.

Tests cover: ExtractionResult contract (3), display equations (1), inline equations (3), page boundaries (2), tempdir lifecycle (1). API surface corrected via Context7: pdf_file_names not input_file_names, {stem}_middle.json not middle.json.

Selective MCP injection in mcp-inject.sh (research agents skip both, code-nav skips Context7, library-focused skips Serena, default: inject both). Removed duplicate bd prime from settings.json. Hookify disabled by user (4 no-op subprocesses per tool call).

Removed bd prime from nx hooks.json (SessionStart + PreCompact). Added agent-type detection to subagent-start.sh — code-review/code-nav agents skip storage docs + operators. Safe fallback: inject all on empty/unparseable stdin.

Implemented _extract_with_mineru() on PDFExtractor. MinerU do_parse with tempdir lifecycle, display+inline equation counting, page boundary approximation, ExtractionResult metadata contract matching Docling path. All 10 tests pass.

Code review findings addressed: docstring for page boundary limitation, 2 error-handling tests added, TODO for Phase 2 wiring, log level changed to info, counters replace full lists. 42/42 tests pass.

6 TDD tests written for auto-detect routing: auto/no-formulas, auto/formulas→MinerU, auto/MinerU-fail→enriched-Docling, forced-docling, forced-mineru, invalid-value. All fail with TypeError (expected — nexus-gl4q will implement the new signature).

Implemented auto-detect routing in extract(). New signature: extract(pdf_path, *, extractor='auto'|'docling'|'mineru'). Auto mode: fast Docling → if formulas → MinerU → enriched Docling → PyMuPDF fallback chain. 48/48 tests pass, backward compatible.
Threaded extractor param through _pdf_chunks, index_pdf, batch_index_pdfs. All default to 'auto' for backward compat. Fixed existing batch test mock to accept new kwarg. 49/49 tests pass.

Code review findings addressed: updated module docstring (3-backend architecture), removed stale TODO, clarified docstring that auto mode uses enriched Docling (required for formula detection). 117/117 tests pass.

Added --extractor [auto|docling|mineru] to nx index pdf. Click.Choice validation, threaded through all 3 index_pdf call sites (dry-run, monitor, plain). ImportError from MinerU converted to click.ClickException. 35/35 index cmd tests pass.

Updated docs/cli-reference.md with --extractor flag docs. Updated docs/architecture.md: pdf pipeline now shows auto-detect routing (Docling→MinerU→PyMuPDF), indexing module description includes FormulaItem counting + has_formulas metadata.
